PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-13-2020 Continued To Feb-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franklin King for Lawrence King.

The Court stated that it received a declaration on January 6th, that the Client is required to sign and verify the pleading, that Counsel can't do it and that it is going to continue the matter for one month and set a future date for status on close of estate. Mr. Franklin stated that he does not know how his Client can confirm anything as to Counsel's knowledge regarding the assets that the Client does not know. The Court stated that the Client can do a declaration based on information and/or knowledge and belief, that on July 17, 2019 there was a petition in which Counsel indicated that he only needed three months to close the estate, that this has gone beyond that and that even then there were Examiner's notes regarding the Clients need to sign documents. The Court also stated that the Client needs to verify everything that is filed with the Court, that it is concerning that the Client is not aware of any of these facts and that there needs to be a verification from the Client verifying that what was filed in Counsel's declaration is true and correct. Mr. Franklin stated that there may be a delay in mail and getting things signed. The Report on Status of Administration, etc. is continued to February 24, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of verification from the Client. Status on close of estate is set for March 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia P. Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-16-2019 Continued To Jan-13-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franklin King appeared by telephone for Lawrence King (Petitioner).

Mr. King stated that the insurance company forwarded a couple of checks to the Executor which are to be received in the next two or three days, and that he is now prepared to file the final inventory and a final petition. The Court informed Mr. King that notice of this hearing has not been properly provided, stated that he should look at Probate Code 12201(b) and 1220, and that Counsel needs to digest the Probate Examiner's notes and do what he needs to do. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is continued to January 13, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice and for Counsel to resolve the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2019 Continued To Dec-16-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-04-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Franklin King for Petitioner via Court Call.

Mr. King stated he mailed the courtesy copy last Monday and the proposed order last Tuesday, that he mailed it to the attention of the previous probate examiner, that he just discovered the notice issue last Friday and will get the proof of service to the court. Mr. King further stated he is trying to get a copy of the contract of the life insurance policy, that the company is out of business and assets were transferred to 3 different companies, and that the life insurance policy is not of value at $150.00. The Court noted the life insurance policy could hold up the administration/closing estate, that Mr. King should contact the current Probate Examiner regarding receipt of courtesy copy, proposed order and proof of service and to include the new hearing date with delivery of his papers. The Report of Status of Administration and Request for Extension of Time to Administer Estate is continued to December 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-23-2019 Continued To Nov-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Continued To Jul-24-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franklin King appeared by telephone for Lawrence King.

Mr. King stated that the Executor is in North Carolina and could not get here, that essentially everything is done and that there is a problem with the inventory and appraisal which is with the Referee. Mr. King also stated that the issue has to do with a small life insurance policy, spoke of the research that was done to find out information about the policy and stated that he was told the policy is worth in the neighborhood of $150.00. In addition, Mr. King stated that it is not worth pursuing, that the policy was purchased by the Decedent's Sister, that the policy was not owned by the Decedent, that it is not part of the estate, spoke of the named beneficiaries and asked for a 45-day continuance. Mr. King also asked if he could take the insurance policy off of the inventory and how he could get that done. The Court informed Mr. King that it can not give him legal advice. Status on close of estate is continued to July 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A petition for approval of report on status of administration is to be filed by July 17, 2019. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-26-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Continued To Jun-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on June 26, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar May-15-2019 Continued To Jun-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Frank King appeared by telephone for Lawrence King (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it reviewed the petition and read the attestation clause. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. Status on close of estate is set for May 15, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
